hero.title: Kebab
hero.subtitle: The authenticity of Italian tradition in every bite

chiSiamo.title: Our Story
chiSiamo.subtitle: A project born from the passion for good food
chiSiamo.description: IKEB was born from the idea of bringing a unique gastronomic experience to Pisa, combining the tradition of kebab with the flavors and quality of Italian cuisine. Every dish is prepared with fresh and selected ingredients, respecting our land and our customers.

tradition.title: Tradition
tradition.description: Recipes passed down and improved over time

passion.title: Passion
passion.description: Love for cooking in every dish

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: Discover our dishes prepared with love

kebab.description: Veal and chicken meat, grilled vegetables, tzatziki sauce

kebab.name: Extra Kebab
kebab.description: XL portion with double meat and melted cheese

kebab.name: Vegetarian Kebab
kebab.description: Grilled vegetables, feta, olives, tahina sauce

kebab.name: Spectacular Kebab
kebab.description: Mixed meat, crispy bacon, egg, cheese

panini.name: Kebab Sandwich
panini.description: Whole wheat bread, kebab, vegetables, sauce

footer.description: Italian kebab in Pisa. Quality, tradition and passion in every dish.

cta.title: Want to be part of the IKEB project?
cta.description: We are looking for passionate collaborators to expand our family.
